basic_details.job_title: MGU Short Term Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Short Term Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MGU Short Term Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed MA in International Relations with a minimum of 55% marks and possess good analytical and communication skills in English are eligible to apply for these Short Term Project Assistant vacancies. The email application process for MGU Short Term Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started and will re

qualification.education_qualification: MA in International Relations (minimum 55% marks), Good analytical and communication skills (English)
qualification.details: Short Term Project Assistant: MA in International Relations with a minimum of 55% marks. Good analytical and communication skills (English). Desired: Experience of working in an international research project / UGC NET / Familiarity with Indo-Pacific Affairs.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Short Term Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Short Term Project Assistant position at Mahatma Gandhi University is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Short Term Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MA in International Relations with a minimum of 55% marks. Good analytical and communication skills in English are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Short Term Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email with complete bio-data and required documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Short Term Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q7. What are the desired qualifications for the Short Term Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Experience in an international research project, UGC NET qualification, or familiarity with Indo-Pacific Affairs are considered desirable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Mahatma Gandhi University located?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi University is located in Kottayam, Kerala, with the pincode 686560.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at Mahatma Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section provided in this article.
